title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/image/v5 to v5.32.0

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/image (github.com/containers/image/v5)</summary>

### [`v5.32.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/image/releases/tag/v5.32.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/image/compare/v5.31.1...v5.32.0)

-   Bump to c/storage v1.54.0 then c/image to v5.31.0 and then to v5.31.1-dev by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2425](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2425)

-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20240529 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2414](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2414)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/hashicorp/go-retryablehttp to v0.7.7 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2437](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2437)
